name: Kaito Kiyomizu
bio: Human agency is the key to unlocking our understanding of gravity. By sharing knowledge and wisdom, we can shape our future.

name: Midori Muraoka
bio: Gravity is a fundamental force that shapes the universe. We must respect its power and study it to understand its secrets.

name: Renn Ichijō
bio: Gravity is a mystery that has captivated human imagination. By embracing the unknown, we can unlock new discoveries and push the boundaries of our understanding.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
